name: @mapconductor/webview-sdk
description: Provider-agnostic native<->JS bridge (packages/bridge) plus a batteries-included Leaflet reference runtime (packages/runtime) for letting native map SDKs (Android/iOS) declaratively drive a web map inside a WebView, for cases native map SDKs can't cover (e.g. deck.gl-style large-data overlays, web-only plugins).
author: MapConductor
